room.waitingForOwner: Waiting for host to start the match

kickConfirm.title: Kick <name>{{name}}</name> from the room?
kickConfirm.lede: This is a kick, not a permanent ban — {{name}} can rejoin any time.

removeBotConfirm.title: Remove <name>{{name}}</name> from the table?
removeBotConfirm.lede: The seat opens up right away — seat another bot or leave it for a player.

transferConfirm.title: Transfer room ownership to another player?
transferConfirm.lede: You stay in the room, but {{toName}} becomes the host. Only a host can hand the ownership back — you can't take it yourself.

room.legendNeutral: Open seats · teams reveal once you sit down

preview.title: Live preview · how the room appears in the lobby

createRoomModal.matchModeHint: 501 for a quicker match, 1001 for the full race

nextSteps.title: What happens next
nextSteps.step1: You land in the new room as host in seat 1.
nextSteps.step2: Share the CODE with friends — or wait for them to find you in the lobby.
nextSteps.step3: Once all four seats are filled, you start the match.

createRoomModal.coinBuyInHint: Each player stakes this to play · default 500

trumpPrompt.subtitleRound1: Adopt this suit, or pass to the next player.
trumpPrompt.subtitleRound2: Round 2 · any suit except the candidate.
trumpPrompt.bodyRound1: The candidate card was turned face-up. Take it as trump for your team, or pass to the next player.
trumpPrompt.waitingRound1: Waiting for <name>{{name}}</name> to take or pass the trump
trumpPrompt.waitingRound2: Waiting for <name>{{name}}</name> to pick a suit or pass

belot.subtitleBelot: You hold the K and Q of trump. Declaring now grants +20. The Queen is the trick card.
belot.subtitleRebelot: You hold the K and Q of trump. Declaring now grants +20. The King is the trick card.
belot.accentStripBelot: Declaring Belote is your move — +20 to your team's score.
belot.accentStripRebelot: Declaring Rebelote is your move — +20 to your team's score.

confirm.title: Surrender the match?
confirm.body: Your teammate must accept. If they decline, your one surrender attempt is consumed.
confirm.consumeWarning: One-shot action — declined proposals burn your only attempt.

prompt.title: Your teammate wants to surrender
prompt.body: {{username}} is proposing to forfeit the match. Accepting ends the match as a win for the opponents.
prompt.consequence: Accepting ends the match in the opponents' favour.

errors.exhausted: You have already used your surrender for this match.
errors.actionRequired: Resolve the pending surrender proposal first.
errors.wrongPhase: Surrender is only available during a live hand.

disconnect.waitingMessageMany: The game is on hold while we wait for {{count}} players to reconnect.
disconnect.reconnectFailed: Reconnection failed — the match may have ended

errors.passwordTooLong: Password must be at most 72 characters

register.subtitle: Pick a name, get a seat. Four players to a table, two to a team.

consent.prefix: By continuing with Google, you agree to the

linkDialog.title: Link your account
linkDialog.description: An account for {{email}} already exists. Enter its password to link Google sign-in — next time you're in with one tap.
linkDialog.descriptionNoEmail: An account with this email already exists. Enter its password to link Google sign-in — next time you're in with one tap.

errors.linkFailed: Couldn't link your account. Please try again.

errors.emailUnverified: Your Google email isn't verified. Verify it with Google and try again.
errors.ssoFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
errors.credentialExpired: Your Google sign-in expired. Tap the Google button and try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
forgotPassword.successBody: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successHint: The link expires in 1 hour. Don't forget to check your spam folder.

errors.requestFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidBody: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one to continue.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordTooLong: Password must be at most 72 characters
errors.resetFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hero.eyebrow: Beljot Online · 2 v 2 · Free to play
hero.subtitle: Beljot is the classic four-player card game — two teams, race to 1001. Find a room in seconds, or invite your usual four with a code.

how.eyebrow: Three steps to the first trick
how.title: You're dealt in before the coffee cools.
how.s1b: Pick a name, no downloads. You're in the lobby in under a minute.
how.s2b: Hit Quick Play and we'll matchmake your four, or open a custom room and share the code with friends.
how.s3b: Take the trump suit, win tricks alongside your partner, and race your team to 1001 points.

feat.f1title: Watch the rooms fill in real time
feat.f1body: Every open room, every seat, updated as it happens. Filter by timer style or points, search by code, or just hit Quick Play and let us seat you.
feat.f2title: It's a partnership, not a free-for-all
feat.f2body: Two against two, the way Beljot is built. Sit across from your partner, read the declarations, and play the long game to 1001. Built-in chat and emotes keep the table talking.
feat.f3title: Every hand counts toward your record
feat.f3body: Track your matches played, win and loss rate, with a full match history hand by hand. See who you win alongside and how tonight stacked up.

cta.title: Your four are waiting.
cta.body: Free forever. No download. Deal the first hand tonight.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: Beljot is built by Emilijan Koteski. Questions, bug reports and feedback are welcome.
contact.disclaimer: This is a beta build for testing purposes — not a finished production product.
